title: distichlis prostrata
intro: Distichlis prostrata, also known as alkali grass, is a type of succulent grass native to the coastal regions of North America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been used to support overall health and wellness, with potential benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Distichlis prostrata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and balance in the body.
